prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor and ink line illustration style, set in a warm and nostalgic study. A hand holds a 3D profile card for X (similar to Twitter), which is a rounded rectangle with a square cutout in the middle. A handsome young man wearing a white top sits casually on the edge of the cutout, with a relaxed smile and a thoughtful expression, styled in a Pixar + semi-realistic blend. The card interface is clean, showing the username @Morris_LT, with information including: philosophy, cognition, AI, finance, self-growth; the bio reads 'Building clear cognition in a complex world'; location 'Universe'; link; joined in 2009. Bottom stats: 1,487 Following / 247K Followers / 3.1M Likes. Hand-drawn style like, comment, and share icons surround the card, glowing softly. The background is a cozy study: wooden bookshelves, philosophy books, Bitcoin, small AI robots, plants, etc. Overall warm tones (watercolor beige, brown, gold), soft sunlight, slight shadows, paper texture, a quiet and contemplative atmosphere. Centered composition, sophisticated feel, rich details, 4K.
